input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the bspd must open the shutdown circuit ev.7.2.2 when there is an open or short circuit in

            rule EV.7.7.3: The BSPD must Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 when there is an open or short circuit in
EV.7.7.3 The BSPD must Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 when there is an open or short circuit in 
any sensor input

final_answer: The BSPD must Open the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.2.2 when there is an open or short circuit in any sensor input
